# Swiggy HDFC Bank Credit Card
## We are happy to share that we are introducing New Swiggy Ornge & BLCK HDFC Bank Credit Cards.
## Existing cardholders will continue to enjoy upgraded features & benefits. Bank will be reaching out to the existing Swiggy HDFC Bank credit card holders to inform about the next steps.
![Swiggy HDFC Bank Credit Card](https://s7ap1.scene7.com/is/image/hdfcbankPWS/swiggy-desktop-banner-v2-1920x550?fmt=webp)
What's in store for you
  * [Card Benefits & Features](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/swiggy-hdfc-bank-credit-card#a "Card Benefits & Features")
  * [Eligibility Criteria](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/swiggy-hdfc-bank-credit-card#c "Eligibility Criteria")

  * [Card Management & Controls](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/swiggy-hdfc-bank-credit-card#b "Card Management & Controls")

## Swiggy Credit Card Savings Calculator
Eat, Earn, Repeat: Get more with the swiggy card.

### Annual benefits on your Swiggy credit card
You can save up to
₹ 12,480Annually
[Apply Now (opens in a new tab)](https://applyonline.hdfc.bank.in/cards/credit-cards.html?CHANNELSOURCE=SWCC&LGCode=MKTG&mc_id=website_organic_swiggy_CC_Cat_pg_apply_online&icid=website_organic_swiggy_CC_Cat_pg_apply_online#nbb "Apply Now") Detailed Summary 
The savings mentioned are estimates and actual savings may vary based on the individual spending pattern.
![One-time GIF](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/calculators/calculator-common-gif/regalia-animated.gif)
![One-time GIF](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/calculators/calculator-common-gif/regalia-animated.gif)
### Detailed benefits break-up
10% cashback on Swiggy food order
₹7,800
5% Cashback on online spends
₹3,900
1% Cashback on all other categories 
₹780
[Apply Now (opens in a new tab)](https://applyonline.hdfc.bank.in/cards/credit-cards.html?CHANNELSOURCE=SWCC&LGCode=MKTG&mc_id=website_organic_swiggy_CC_Cat_pg_apply_online&icid=website_organic_swiggy_CC_Cat_pg_apply_online#nbb "Apply Now ")
### More rewards than ever before
Welcome Benefits
  * Complimentary 3 Months Swiggy One Membership, on activating your card within first 30 days of card issuance.


Swiggy Benefits
  * 10% CashBack on spends across Swiggy App on Food orders, Instamart, Dineout & Genie.


Credit Benefits
  * Up to 50 days of interest-free Credit from the date of purchase*


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/swiggy-hdfc-bank-credit-card#benefits "View More")
![Print](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
![Swiggy HDFC Bank Credit Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
## Additional Benefits
### CashBack Benefits
  * 5% CashBack on online spends across multiple apps and website.
  * 1% CashBack on other category spends, except for fuel, rent, EMI, wallet, jewellery and Government related transactions*


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/swiggy-hdfc-bank-credit-card "View More")
![Swiggy HDFC Bank Credit Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
### Golf Benefits
  * Access to golf courses worldwide and 12 free lessons per year
  * 4 complimentary rounds of green fees per calendar year
  * Discounted golf services at 50% of the green fee beyond complimentary sessions
[Click Here(opens in a new tab)](https://specials.priceless.com/en-in/offers/Mastercard_World_Card_India_Golf_Program?Oid=201902180041) for more details.
*T&C Apply.


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/swiggy-hdfc-bank-credit-card "View More")
![Swiggy HDFC Bank Credit Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
### Banking Benefits
  * Ability to convert large transactions to a SmartEMI after purchase
  * Contactless payments* to improve your purchase experience
  * Protection against fraudulent transactions made on your Credit Card*
  * Simple card management via HDFC Bank MyCards


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/swiggy-hdfc-bank-credit-card "View More")
![Swiggy HDFC Bank Credit Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
## Wondering if you are eligible?
Salaried
  * **Nationality:** Indian
  * **Age:** 21 – 60 years
  * **Income (Monthly) -** ₹15,000 and above


Self-Employed
  * **Age** : 21 – 65 years
  * **Annual ITR** > ₹6,00,000


![Print](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
## Documents required to get you started
Identity Proof
  * Passport
  * Aadhaar card
  * Voter ID
  * Driving licence
  * PAN card
  * Passport size photographs


Address Proof
  * Utility bills (electricity, water, gas, or telephone)
  * Rental agreement
  * Passport
  * Aadhaar card
  * Voter ID


Income Proof
  * Salary slips (for salaried individuals)
  * Income Tax Returns (ITR)
  * Form 16
  * Bank statements


## Apply Now in 3 Easy Steps:
The Steps are:
  * Step 1 - Provide & validate your Phone Number & Date of Birth/PAN
  * Step 2- Confirm your details
  * Step 3- Select your Card
  * Step 4- Submit & Receive your Card*


*In certain cases, uploading documents and completing video KYC might be required.
![Swiggy HDFC Bank Credit Card Application Process](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
## Know more about the card
  1. ### Fees and Charges
  2. ### Card Reward & Redemption Program
  3. ### Contactless Payment
  4. ### Additional Features
  5. ### Revolving Credit
  6. ### Swiggy HDFC Bank Credit Card Value Chart
  7. ### Most Important Terms and Conditions
  8. ### Application Channels


#  Fees and Charges 
  * Joining Fee / Renewal Membership Fee – ₹500 /- + Applicable Charges
  * Spend ₹2,00,000 or more in a year, before your Credit Card renewal date and get your renewal fee waived off


  * Exclusions for Spends of ₹ 2,00,000 and above for eligibility of renewal year fee waiver are as follows:
    1. Cash on Call
    2. Balance Transfer
    3. Cash Withdrawal.


[Click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/swiggy-hdfc-bank-credit-card/pdf/card-member-agreement-swiggy-hdfc-bank-credit-card-1.pdf) for Card Member Agreement
[Check Now](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/swiggy-hdfc-bank-credit-card/fees-and-charges) to know more details of Fees and Charges
![Revolving Credit](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
#  Card Reward & Redemption Program 
Cashback earned on Swiggy HDFC Bank Credit Card will be in the form of Statement Credit post 21st Jun ’24. Cashback for the previous month will be adjusted in the subsequent month’s statement balance
![Fuel Surcharge Waiver](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
#  Contactless Payment 
  * Swiggy HDFC Bank Credit Card is enabled* for Contactless Payments at retail outlets. 


(Note: In India, payment through contactless mode is allowed for a maximum of ₹5,000 for a single transaction where you are not asked to input your Credit Card PIN. However, if the amount is higher than or equal to ₹5,000, the Card holder must enter the Credit Card PIN for security reasons. You may check for the Contactless Network Symbol on your card.)
![Contactless Payment](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
#  Additional Features 
**Smart EMI**
  * Option to convert big spends into EMI after purchase available on Swiggy HDFC Bank Credit Card. ([Click here](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/smartemi) to know more) 


**Zero Cost Card Liability**
  * Available on any fraudulent transactions made on your Credit Card if reported immediately to HDFC Bank’s 24-hour Call Centre.


**CashBack Limit**
  * CashBack is not applicable on transactions less than ₹100


![Additional Features](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
#  Revolving Credit 
  * Available at a nominal interest rate. (Check Fees and Charges section for more details)


  * Cardholder can activate the card by following one or more below mentioned ways in order to enjoy the welcome benefit:
    1. Making a transaction using the Credit Card,
    2. To use the card via OTP or IVR, setting PIN for the card, and enabling card controls such as online transactions, enabling international transactions etc.
  * For more details on card activation, [Click Here](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/services/activation-guidelines)
  * The customers need to claim 'Swiggy One' on Swiggy app post card activation to unlock the benefit.  

  * This option will be available on the Swiggy app within 2-3 days of card activation


![Revolving Credit](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
#  Swiggy HDFC Bank Credit Card Value Chart   
| Benefits  | Offers  | Monthly Spends  | Annusal Savings  |  
| --- | --- | --- | --- |  
| Cashback & Key Milestones  | 10% Cashback on Swiggy Food ordering*  | 15000  | 18000  |  
|   | 5% Cashback on E-shopping spends*  | 30000  | 18000  |  
|   | 1% Cashback on all other categories*  | 50000  | 6000  |  
| Additional Benefits  | Swiggy One Membership*(3 months)  | 1199  |  
|   |  Avg. savings* for 3 months on usage of Swiggy One Membership  |   | 2100  |  
|   |   | 95,000  | 45299  |  
| *T&Cs apply  |  
![Revolving Credit](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
#  Most Important Terms and Conditions 
  * *The (opens in a new tab)[Most Important Terms and Conditions(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/co-branded-most-important-terms-and-conditions-for-credit-cards.pdf "Most Important Terms and Conditions") for each of our banking offerings features all the specific terms and conditions that govern their use. You must go through it thoroughly to fully understand the terms and conditions applicable to any banking product you choose.
  * [Click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/swiggy-hdfc-bank-credit-card/pdf/terms-and-conditions-swiggy-hdfc-bank-credit-card-26052026.pdf) for product specific T&C.
  * [Click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/cards/services) to access all important links related to your Credit Card.
  * [Click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/swiggy-hdfc-bank-credit-card/pdf/card-member-agreement-swiggy.pdf) for the card member agreement


![Revolving Credit](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
#  Application Channels 
You can choose any of the following easy options to apply for your HDFC Bank Credit Card:
  * **1. Website  
**You can quickly apply online by clicking [here(opens in a new tab)](https://applyonline.hdfc.bank.in/cards/credit-cards.html?CHANNELSOURCE=SWCC&LGCode=MKTG#nbb).
  * **2. NetBanking  
**If you're an existing HDFC Bank customer, simply[ log in(opens in a new tab)](https://netbanking.hdfcbank.com/netbanking/ "https://netbanking.hdfcbank.com/netbanking/") to NetBanking and apply from the ‘Cards’ section.
  * **3. HDFC Bank Branch  
**Prefer a face-to-face interaction? Just visit your nearest [branch(opens in a new tab)](https://near-me.hdfcbank.com/branch-atm-locator/ "https://near-me.hdfcbank.com/branch-atm-locator/") and our staff will help you with the application.


![Ways to Apply](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)

##  Frequently Asked Questions 
###  What are the key benefits of Swiggy HDFC Bank Credit Card?
You are eligible to earn 10% Cashback on Swiggy App transactions (Food ordering, Instamart, Dineout & Genie) up to ₹,1500 per billing cycle. Please note that transactions done using Swiggy Money Wallet, Swiggy Liquor, Swiggy Minis won’t earn you any cashback. Also, any other exclusion category (if any) may be communicated to you from time to time. With Swiggy HDFC Bank Credit Card, you can enjoy 5% Cashback on various online categories up to ₹1,500 per billing cycle. This benefit is applicable on Apparels, Electronics, Dept. Stores, Personal Care, Local Cabs, Home Décor, Pet Stores and Supplies, Pharmacies, Discount Stores and Entertainment. For more information on inclusion categories and MCCs please refer to Swiggy HDFC Bank Credit Card T&Cs available on HDFC Bank website.
Over and above this, you can also enjoy 1% CashBack on other categories up to ₹500 per billing cycle except on Fuel, Rent, EMI, Wallet, Jewelry and Govt. related spends. For more details on key benefits, please refer to Swiggy HDFC Bank Credit Card T&C For information on welcome benefit please refer to Q.4 .
Cashback will not be accrued for the following transactions using Swiggy HDFC Bank Credit Card Wallet Rent Government related transactions Fuel Jewellery EMI (all types) Cash advances, Purchase of travelers’ cheques, Purchase of foreign currency and fees, Interest charge and penalties Any other categories as decided from time to time. This will be applicable on Offline spends 
###  What is the customer value that Swiggy HDFC Bank Credit Card provides?
The customers can save up to ₹42,000 annually and even more with Swiggy HDFC Bank Credit Card.
Refer table in the [PDF(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/swiggy-hdfc-bank-credit-card/pdf/Frequently-Asked-Questions%E2%80%93Swiggy-HDFC-Bank-Credit-Card.pdf)
###  What is Swiggy One membership?
The Swiggy One Membership is a premium subscription program for Swiggy users. A single membership that offers unlimited benefits across restaurants, Instamart and Genie orders on Swiggy including free delivery and exclusive discounts from select restaurants.
Click [here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/swiggy-hdfc-bank-credit-card/frequently-asked-questions-swiggy-hdfc-bank-credit-card.pdf) to read more FAQs
###  What is the welcome benefit of the Swiggy HDFC Bank Credit Card? 
Complimentary Swiggy One Membership for 3 Months on card activation as per latest RBI guidelines. In accordance with RBI guidelines, cardholder can activate the card by following one or more below mentioned ways: 
  * Making a transaction using the Credit Card, 


To use the card via OTP or IVR, setting PIN for the card, and enabling card controls such as online transactions, enabling international transactions etc.
Please click here for more details on card activation. Link: https://www.hdfcbank.com/personal/pay/cards/credit-cards/credit-card-activation-guidelines Please note that definition of RBI prescribed card activation may change from time to time. Always refer to current definition of card activation as per RBI, in order to unlock the welcome benefit. 
In case the cardholder is already a Swiggy One member, the membership will be extended for next 3 months. Please refer to Swiggy One Membership T&Cs available on Swiggy App for more details. Please click [here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.swiggy.com/terms-and-conditions) (available on the section under Swiggy One Membership Specific terms) for the detailed T&Cs Link:<https://www.swiggy.com/terms-and-conditions>[(opens in a new tab)](https://www.swiggy.com/terms-and-conditions).
###  What is Swiggy HDFC Bank Credit Card?
Swiggy HDFC Bank Credit is a best-in-class product which offers accelerated benefits on Swiggy App and online shopping. Additionally, get a cashback on usage of the card on all other offline spends as well. On activation of the card, get a Swiggy one membership as welcome benefit for 3 months. The card is designed specifically for Swiggy users and customers who have an affinity towards online shopping. HDFC Bank is offering this card in partnership with Swiggy.
